sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95569" key="so/bhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σόβ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n95569.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">agitation, excitement</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.671f</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περί τι</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">286c</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n95569.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> sq.</sense> </entryFree>
